records.question: Which people aged at least 31 graduated from Oklahoma and work for PetroChina, an Oil and gas company headquartered in China with sales exactly 310.1 billion and a market value of at least 294.7 billion?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT people.people_id FROM people
JOIN employment ON people.people_id = employment.people_id
JOIN company ON employment.company_id = company.company_id
WHERE company.sales_in_billion = 310.1 AND people.graduation_college = 'Oklahoma' AND company.market_value_in_billion >= 294.7 AND company.industry = 'Oil and gas' AND people.age >= 31 AND company.headquarters = 'China' AND company.name = 'PetroChina'
records.pred_sql: select people.people_id from people join employment on people.people_id = employment.people_id join company on employment.company_id = company.company_id where people.age >= 31 and lower(people.graduation_college) like '%oklahoma%' and lower(company.name) like '%petrochina%' and lower(company.industry) like '%oil and gas%' and lower(company.headquarters) like '%china%' and company.sales_in_billion = 310.1 and company.market_value_in_billion >= 294.7 limit 5
records.thought: Filter people aged at least 31 who graduated from Oklahoma, join with employment and company to find those working for PetroChina with specified industry, headquarters, sales, and market value conditions.

records.question: What people named Darryl Kennedy from the United States graduated from Oklahoma and are at most 31 years old?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT people.people_id FROM people
WHERE people.name = 'Darryl Kennedy' AND people.graduation_college = 'Oklahoma' AND people.age <= 31 AND people.nationality = 'United States'
records.pred_sql: select people.people_id from people where lower(name) like '%darryl kennedy%' and lower(nationality) like '%united states%' and lower(graduation_college) like '%oklahoma%' and age <= 31 limit 5;
records.thought: Filter people by name containing 'darryl kennedy', nationality containing 'united states', graduation college containing 'oklahoma', and age at most 31.

records.question: Which people named Jerry Corcoran work for companies with sales of at least 221.9 billion?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT people.people_id FROM people
JOIN employment ON people.people_id = employment.people_id
JOIN company ON employment.company_id = company.company_id
WHERE people.name = 'Jerry Corcoran' AND company.sales_in_billion >= 221.9

records.thought: Filter people named Jerry Corcoran and join with employment and company tables to find those working at companies with sales of at least 221.9 billion.

records.question: Who are the 37-year-olds working at Oil and gas companies with profits of at most 25.7 billion?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT people.people_id FROM people
JOIN employment ON people.people_id = employment.people_id
JOIN company ON employment.company_id = company.company_id
WHERE company.industry = 'Oil and gas' AND people.age = 37 AND company.profits_in_billion <= 25.7
records.pred_sql: select people.people_id from people join employment on people.people_id = employment.people_id join company on employment.company_id = company.company_id where people.age = 37 and lower(company.industry) like '%oil and gas%' and company.profits_in_billion <= 25.7 limit 5
records.thought: Filter people aged 37 who work at companies in the 'Oil and gas' industry with profits less than or equal to 25.7 billion by joining people, employment, and company tables.

records.question: Who graduated from Northeastern and has been working for at most 1 year?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT people.people_id FROM people
JOIN employment ON people.people_id = employment.people_id
WHERE employment.year_working <= 1 AND people.graduation_college = 'Northeastern'
records.pred_sql: select people.people_id from people join employment on people.people_id = employment.people_id where lower(people.graduation_college) like '%northeastern%' and employment.year_working <= 1 limit 5;
records.thought: Filter people who graduated from Northeastern and join with employment to find those who have been working for at most 1 year.

records.question: Who is exactly 37 years old and graduated from Virginia?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT people.people_id FROM people
WHERE people.age = 37 AND people.graduation_college = 'Virginia'
